date_published.description: A publication date in YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM, or YYYY format.

language.description: Language code to filter books by language (e.g., `en` for English, `fr` for French, etc.)

page.description: The number of page to retrieve, please note the API will not return more than 10,000 results no matter how you paginate them

page_size.description: How many items should be returned per page, maximum of 1,000

language.description: Language code to filter books by language (e.g., `en` for English, `fr` for French, etc.)

should_match_all.description:
If set to `1` or `true`, the API will return books where the title 
        or author exactly contains all the words entered by the user.

year.description: Filter books by year of publication

author.description: The name of an author in the Author's database

isbn.description: an ISBN 10 in the Books database

isbn13.description: an ISBN 13 in the Books database

publisher.description: The name of a publisher in the Publisher's database

subject.description: A subject in the Subject's database

text.description: A string to search for determinated index database

info.description:
Definition of ISBNdb.com API v2.

***Note: A 404 Not Found response for an ISBN lookup typically
indicates that the book information is not yet available in our database.
However, due to frequent updates, there is a high probability that the data will be 
added shortly, often within a minute or up to 24 hours. We recommend trying your request 
again after a while, as the information may soon become accessible***
info.title: ISBNdb API v2

get.description:
Returns the book details. 
        
**A 404 Not Found response for an ISBN lookup typically indicates that the book information is not yet available
in our database. However, due to frequent updates, there is a high probability that the data will be added shortly,
often within a minute or up to 24 hours. We recommend trying your request again after a while, as the information
may soon become accessible.**

parameters.description:
Whether to include prices in the response. 
        
***Performance Impact:*** Enabling this will increase response time, as current prices are fetched from vendors in real time.
parameters.name: with_prices

post.description:
This method returns a list of books that match the query and is available on all plans. The endpoint has no pagination but comes with the following limits based on your plan:

- Academic: Up to 10 ISBN numbers per request.
- Basic: Up to 100 ISBN numbers per request.
- Pro and Premium: Up to 1,000 ISBN numbers per request.

If you send 100 ISBN numbers you will get information back for all 100 books in the response provided the ISBNs do exist in the ISBNdb Database. ISBN Numbers not found in the ISBNdb database will not be part of the response. There is a limit of up to 6MB response size, if the limit is exceeded you will get a 500 error reply.

__This endpoint does not return pricing information.__

get.description:
This returns a list of books that match the query.

**This endpoint does not return pricing information.**
